title: German petrol price control law has backfired: economists
summary_full: Economy and Energy Minister Katherina Reiche said in March that petrol stations would have to limit any price rises to once per day at noon
summary_public: Economy and Energy Minister Katherina Reiche said in March that petrol stations would have to limit any price rises to once per day at noon

DE.label: negative
DE.evidence: German petrol price control law has backfired
